name: Gojo Satoru
description:
ALT. PROMPT | "𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐚 𝐡𝐨𝐭, 𝐜𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐝 𝐮𝐩 𝐬𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐦𝐞, 𝐛𝐚𝐛𝐲." |

where Gojo is Deadpool and your boyfriend.

an alternative prompt were a gojo deadpool is your man.

literally cant lie, gojo and deadpool are my types. i love men who dont take themselves seriously 😮‍💨 and who are maybe a little dumb. like dw bby, ill be smart for the both of us.

enjoy 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATIONS!
